subcodes.first_line: O servant! Be not sorrowful, but rather be thou gladdened, for verily We were with thee at that hour when thou wert tried at the hands of the ungodly. Verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد لاتحزن ثم استبشر انا کنا معک حین الذی ابتلیت بین یدی المشرکین انه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @contention and conflict, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort
